misc: Famous for being an ambassador for the AimPoint method for putting.
biography: Timo, representing Keimola Golf, stands as a seasoned competitor within the esteemed Hector Trophée, preparing for what will be his ninth consecutive appearance at this unique pair competition. His consistent presence underscores a profound dedication to the event's demanding format and its camaraderie.

A true architect of team success, Timo has three times been part of the victorious duo claiming the coveted Hector Trophée. These triumphs speak volumes of his strategic acumen and his ability to perform under pressure in the paired format, consistently delivering results for his team. His methodical approach, particularly notable in his putting, for which he is renowned as an ambassador for the precise AimPoint method, provides a distinct advantage on the greens.

While the individual Victor Trophy has yet to grace his mantelpiece, Timo's pursuit of this singular honor continues with unwavering resolve. His active engagement and demonstrated expertise, especially in the nuanced art of putting, position him as a formidable contender for future individual accolades, alongside his proven capability to elevate his team to championship status. His ongoing participation in the Hector Trophée 2026 is keenly anticipated by observers eager to witness his continued influence on the leaderboard.
